Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-09-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF EDELMIRA LUNA's Motion To Amend Complaint is GRANTED. First Amended Complaint must be filed and served forthwith.Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-03-2017 Continued To Jul-17-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-01-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kelli Shields (415-773-1240) of Greenstein and McDonald for Plaintiff/Moving party Edelmira Luna.
Paul F. Utrecht (415-357-0600) for non-party Dolch, Special Administrator.

The Court announces the tentative ruling and inquires previously granted motion to withdrawal. Hearing is held. Argued re: service and parties served, status of Mr. Holland, Probate Court, and trial continuance. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF EDELMIRA LUNA Motion To Amend Complaint is to be re-filed to be heard on 2/16/17. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-06-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT LISA PEGUESE's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS LISA PEGUESE and JAMES JONES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts to support each cause of action and is not uncertain. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-13-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS LISA PEGUESE amd JAMES JONES' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is DENIED. Complaint alleges facts in support of request for punitive damages re: conscious disregard of Plaintiff's rights and safety.Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported (D501)
